info.name: Phase 5 – AI Extraction
info.description: Testing the AI Extraction pipeline. It evaluates a NormalizedDocument, applies the Rule Engine, and calls the configured LLM only when processing is allowed.

body.raw:
{
  "id": "doc-1",
  "sender": "John Doe",
  "subject": "Parent-teacher meeting",
  "content": "The meeting is next Friday at 3 PM.",
  "labels": ["school"],
  "priority": "1",
  "source": "email"
}

request.description: Rule Engine returns PROCESS, the configured LLM is invoked, and the JSON response is parsed into ExtractionResult.

response.name: Success response

body.raw:
{
  "id": "doc-2",
  "sender": "Spam Sender",
  "subject": "Buy now",
  "content": "Special offer just for you.",
  "labels": ["spam"],
  "priority": "0",
  "source": "email"
}

request.description: Rule Engine returns IGNORE or another non-PROCESS decision, so the LLM is not invoked.

response.name: Skipped response

request.description: Demonstrates the error shape returned when JSON parsing, provider access, or prompt loading fails.

response.name: Error response
